# Public Roadmap

Tracked on the [Sanctifier Roadmap](https://github.com/orgs/Centurylong/projects) GitHub Project board.

## Views

- **By area** — filter on `area:*` labels
- **By priority** — filter on `priority:*` labels
- **Hackathon** — filter on `hackathon` label

## Maintainer setup (one-time)

1. Create a GitHub Project from the repo (Board layout).
2. Add the views above as saved filters.
3. Set repo variable `ROADMAP_PROJECT_URL` to the project URL (Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → Variables).
4. New issues auto-land on the board via `.github/workflows/add-to-project.yml`.

## How to propose work

- **Ideas** → [Discussions](https://github.com/Centurylong/sanctifier/discussions) first
- **Actionable tasks** → open an issue with the Bug Report or Feature Request template
